---
title: "Notes: Session 11: Integration and exam preparation"
format: html
---

| Time (min) | Duration | Topic | Additional materials |
|------------|----------|-------|----------------------|
| 0–90       | 90       | TODO  |                      |

::: callout-note
TODO

Show the repository (ask for a star)
-> each exercise sheet: 1500 lines of code, datasets: created synthetically (just for this course), evaluations,...

:::
